title: Private-message typing hardening
summary: Hardens private-message typing indicators so start/stop typing packets render and clear reliably across send, focus, close, reconnect, and late-window-open races.
changes: Centralized PM/group typing start logic in the frontend.
Re-rendered existing inbound typing state when PM windows open late.
Added focus, composition-end, visibility, pagehide, disconnect, and reconnect handling for conversation typing state.
Reset typing throttle after stop events so new typing bursts can be shown immediately.
Added server-side direct_stop_typing cleanup after accepted direct messages.
Kept stop-typing cleanup under the generic Socket.IO event guard while avoiding stricter start-typing strike behavior.
validation: node --check on all static JS files
